title: Best coffee spot in Baalbek
text: The espresso is always on point and the cappuccino is super smooth. The place feels calm and welcoming — perfect for a quick break or a long chat with friends.
name: Nabih A.

title: Cozy atmosphere & great service
text: Loved the vibe from the first minute. Friendly team, clean place, and the drinks are consistently good. My favorite is the iced latte — balanced and refreshing.
name: Sara A.

title: Perfect for work and quiet time
text: I come here when I need focus. The music is chill, the seating is comfortable, and the coffee keeps me going. Great spot if you want a peaceful café experience.
name: Nour K.

title: Amazing drinks & desserts
text: Everything tastes fresh and well-made. The frappe is rich and creamy, and the desserts are a great match with coffee. Definitely one of my top spots in town.
name: Khaled M.
